title: Rick & Mortys Portal Gun
description: This Datapack adds the Portal Gun from Rick and Morty, along with other Items and 12 custom Dimensions!
body:
[Mr3DAlien.net](http://mr3dalien.net 'http://mr3dalien.net') **|** [Discord](http://discord.mr3dalien.net 'http://discord.mr3dalien.net') **|** [Alien-Packs](https://linktr.ee/AlienPacks 'https://linktr.ee/AlienPacks') **|** [Partners](https://linktr.ee/AlienPartners 'https://linktr.ee/AlienPartners')
## Resource Pack Requirement

To fully utilize this datapack and ensure its proper functionality, it is mandatory to download and install the accompanying resource pack. The resource pack is an integral part of the gameplay and provides essential textures and audio assets required by the datapack.

Please download the [Required Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alien-packs) and install it before using the datapack. Without the resource pack, the datapack may not work as intended and you may miss out on crucial visual and audio elements.
# Rick & Morty Portal Gun Datapack

## Description

The Rick and Morty Portal Gun Datapack adds an exciting dimension-hopping experience to your Minecraft world. With this datapack, you'll gain access to 12 unique dimensions, a powerful Portal Gun inspired by Rick and Morty, and even encounter the enigmatic Council of Rick.

Explore a multiverse of possibilities as you wield the Portal Gun and venture into different dimensions. Simply right-click with the Portal Gun to create a portal in front of you, which will teleport you to a randomly selected dimension.

Embark on thrilling adventures, encounter new challenges, and uncover hidden treasures as you navigate through the multiverse with the Rick and Morty Portal Gun Datapack!

# Admin Stuff
In order to change some settings in the datapack you need to give yourself the **admin** tag

> **How can I give myself the admin tag?**
> > You can give yourself the tag using `/tag @s admin` (You need to be OP)

> **What can I do with the admin tag?**
> > You can use the **admin** tag to cheat yourself some items, or change settings like disabling the random spawning of blue portals. It also shows you some admin information, like if the datapack did correctly reload
<details>
<summary>Cheat in Items</summary>

For this to work you eather need to have the **admin** tag, or you need to be in **Creative**
  
  
There are 2 methods you can use to give yourself some items from the datapack:

You can either use `/trigger ap-rm_give_item` and just click yourself through the pages that appear in the chat, or you can take a look at the ID list below and search for the item ID that you need and use:  
`/trigger ap-rm_give_item set ID`

[Google Sheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1om-_VFdn1OQ8q-HR4o32RXqDFaFH0YWybvhEyHoCG0Y/edit?usp=sharing 'The Google Sheet Version')

<details>
<summary>Disable Blue Portals</summary>

To disable the random spawning of **Blue Portals** you can use `/trigger ap-rm_doRMSpawning`
